---
name: "Cleanup Stale Branches"
description: "Interactively delete stale branches after confirmation, with audit logging for local and remote branches."
agent: "Cleanup Stale Branches"
argument-hint: "Optional: comma-separated branch names to auto-delete; optional: skip-author-check"
---
Safely delete confirmed stale branches.

Follow branch cleanup safety rules from `AGENTS.md`. Confirm each deletion and maintain an audit trail.
